chinese_news.title: 硬氪首发|moody前高管搭档大疆骨干入局陪伴机器人，锦秋领投，融资数千万
chinese_news.summary:
硬氪获悉，AI-Native科技潮玩品牌ZuzuZoos查无此园（杭州多蓝艾梦智能科技旗下）近日完成数千万元Pre-A轮融资，锦秋领投、上海复容跟投。此次融资将主要AI大模型迭代、硬件产品扩建、IP生态深化、全球市场拓展、核心团队扩容。

ZuzuZoos成立于2025年，聚焦“AI陪伴机器人+AI潮玩”。创始人董晓楠是前摩根士丹利投资银行分析师，曾任新消费独角兽企业moody事业部总经理，任职期间拉动GMV从2亿元增长至10亿元。硬件负责人是前大疆清扫机器人机械结构负责人，深耕机器人及智能硬件领域15余年，主导多款机器人研发与落地。IP设计团队来自泡泡玛特、迪士尼等IP大厂，AI团队来自智谱等头部大模型公司。

当下，陪伴机器人赛道已经涌入大量玩家，许多公司追求“更聪明”，董晓楠表示，ZuzuZoos更在意如何让AI角色真正为用户提供情绪体验，于是选择了一条差异化路径：不只是把AI机器人做成“会聊天的电子宠物”，而是尝试把AI、潮玩与IP世界观结合，创造一个有“活人感”和持续生命力的硅基伙伴。

“潮玩的底色本就带有反叛精神，消费

chinese_news.title: 安踏发布“折纸科技”，试图从结构设计寻找跑鞋缓震新方向
chinese_news.summary:
36氪获悉，6月16日，安踏在上海创新创意设计研究院发布全新跑鞋技术平台“折纸科技（ANTA FOLD）”，并同步推出首款搭载该技术的跑鞋产品折纸H1。

过去十余年，运动鞋行业的创新主要围绕材料展开。从EVA、TPU到Pebax等高性能发泡材料，各大品牌持续通过中底材料升级提升缓震与回弹表现。近年来，随着材料性能逐渐接近瓶颈，越来越多品牌开始将研发重点延伸至结构设计领域，希望通过几何构型优化进一步释放性能空间。

安踏此次推出的“折纸科技”，正是这一趋势下的最新尝试。

根据安踏介绍，该项目由安踏创新实验室联合牛津大学、天津大学及浙江大学相关研究团队共同研发。与传统依赖材料软硬度实现缓震不同，折纸科技试图利用特定折叠结构实现受力形变与能量管理，从而构建一套新的中底缓震方案。

其核心思路源于折纸工程学（Origami Engineering）。

作为一门融合数学、材料学与结构力学的交叉学科，折纸工程近年来已被广泛应用于航空航天、机器人、医疗器械等领域。通过特定的折叠几何结构，材料能够在有限空间内实

chinese_news.title: 科氪 | 两轮电动车没有天花板，爱玛黑翼要用AI与硬核科技赢得年轻男性的心
chinese_news.summary: 国内两轮电动车市场正悄然迎来一场深层次的“基因突变”。长期以来，大众对两轮电动车的认知被牢牢框定在“代步工具”与“大众精品”的传统叙事里。然而，在四川省体育馆的一场发布会上，爱玛正式发布了旗下专为年轻男性打造的极速运动品类品牌——“爱玛黑翼”（AIMA BLACK WING）。首位中国F1车手周冠宇化身“全速领航员”在线助力，爱玛黑翼S360电竞版、爱玛黑翼S360赛道版以及爱玛黑翼S790赛博版三款硬核新品集结亮相。这场动作透露出的创投信号再明显不过：在女性和基础通勤赛道筑牢绝对壁垒后，传统头部巨头爱玛正以一种颠覆性的姿态，正式向年轻男性性能与运动电摩赛道发起总攻。36氪通过与爱玛科技集团三位核心高管的深度专访，试图拆解两轮电动车从功能代步全面迈向体验升级的下半场逻辑，看他们如何锚定Z世代的硬核社交货币，打破行业所谓的“天花板”。

chinese_news.title: 科氪 | 纯粹热爱的城市探索玩家而来 ，爱玛黑翼三大新车集结亮相
chinese_news.summary:
6月17日，爱玛黑翼品牌战略发布会在四川省体育馆盛大开启。体育馆化身爱玛黑翼玩家街区，潮流青年齐聚现场。爱玛黑翼以“全速热爱”为品牌主张，携爱玛黑翼S360电竞版、爱玛黑翼S360赛道版、爱玛黑翼S790赛博版三款车型重磅亮相，首位中国F1车手周冠宇以爱玛黑翼“全速领航员”身份在线助力品牌发布。爱玛黑翼的登场，标志着爱玛电动车在男性出行科技领域树立起全新坐标，正式构建起“他硬核”增长格局，向“时尚科技年轻品牌”全速进阶。

chinese_news.summary:
大公司：

滴滴自动驾驶参加伦敦MOVE 2026大会

6月17至18日，MOVE 2026大会在英国伦敦召开，滴滴自动驾驶在会上分享了来自中国的自动驾驶落地实践。在AI技术方面，滴滴自动驾驶已实现L4级全栈核心技术的自主可控；硬件方面，与广汽埃安联合打造的新一代Robotaxi车型R2已于今年1月交付，正持续在广州和北京等地开展道路测试；在场景应用上，自去年四季度在广州、北京部分示范应用区域开启全天候载客测试以来，滴滴自动驾驶始终保持安全稳定的运行表现。

chinese_news.title: 蔚来补上“智驾课”，任少卿总结：智驾技术创新将重构竞争
chinese_news.summary:
文｜肖漫
编辑｜李勤

6月18日，蔚来同时向两代平台车型（包含8款NT2.0平台车型、4款NT2.5平台车型，以及6款NT3.0车型）推送了最新版的世界模型，这意味着，蔚来现在能让同一套复杂的智驾代码，现在能跑在不同代际的芯片上。

软件迭代节奏被硬件绑架曾是一个困扰行业的难题。很多车企无法在不同版本、配置的车型上迭代同一款软件，这带来的结果是，很长时间内只有使用最新版本硬件的车才能用上最好的软件，老车主被背刺。

蔚来部署推理跨平台兼容

chinese_news.title: 中国游戏的错位竞争：头部赌3A，腰部吃存量 | 游戏风向标
chinese_news.summary:
文丨小葵

编辑丨果脯

中国游戏产业正站在一个微妙的分水岭上。

一边，腾讯网易等头部大厂利用资本，以全球资源整合或漫长自研��期，向代表行业塔尖的3A单机游戏发起冲锋；另一边，以4399百奥为代表的腰部力量，在各自深耕的细分赛道里，通过成熟玩法复刻与精细化运营，稳守利润阵地。

今年夏日游戏节的发布会上，数十家全球顶尖游戏厂商轮番登台，发布了超过50款新作的最新消息。

在海外大厂普遍打出“老IP重制+续作”保守牌局中，腾讯和网易同时拿出3A级的单机产品，并肩出现在全球顶级展会的聚光灯下。

当大厂渴望用3A讲述中国故事建立全球品牌壁垒，腰部厂商则在存量市场中持续收割，一个向上押注3A，一个向下蚕食存量。这两条看似背道而驰的路，正共用着同一个起点。

01

chinese_news.title: 12306要忙着赚钱了
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 王晗玉

编辑 | 张帆

近日，市场监管总局联合中央网信办、国家铁路局，依法约谈携程、同程、去哪儿、飞猪、美团、智行火车票、高铁管家7家旅游出行第三方平台，直指平台在火车票销售领域存在多项不规范经营行为。

具体来看，违规行为包括不当宣传“候补帮抢”及付费选座、不当诱导用户“买长乘短”“买短乘长”，不当收集、使用用户个人信息等问题。后续监管部门将加大监管执法力度。

此次集中约谈，不仅直指OTA平台火车票业务的乱象根源，也揭开了在线旅游行业围绕出行流量展开的深层博弈。

监管收紧的背景下，传统OTA依赖的流量逻辑正在动摇，而铁路官方平台跨界拓展酒旅业务的可能性，也让整个在线出行行业迎来新一轮变数。

抢票“加速包”，OTA的“流量加速包”

每逢各大、小长假，打开OTA平台的火车票页面，“极速抢票”“候补加速”“高成功率帮抢”等标语便铺天盖地，甚至

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $65,000 on June 30, 2026?

market_questions_to_create.question: Will SpaceX achieve a $2 trillion+ valuation (private or public) by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: PitchBook, Crunchbase, or SpaceX-announced valuation in any funding round or IPO filing
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: SpaceX shares up 37% post-launch at $135; market cap is ~$1.35T but momentum and Starlink near-commercialization could justify higher multiples—few markets pricing the binary jump to $2T.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: Musk's SpaceX stake is worth over $1 trillion; shares up 37% after historic debut; Starlink commercialization timeline and next funding round timing critical

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Apple stock outperform the S&P 500 by >8% through September 30, 2026, despite raising prices?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Yahoo Finance, Bloomberg terminal, or SEC filing—price-return comparison from 2026-05-05 close
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Memory shortage forcing rare Apple price increases signals margin expansion, but market may misread as demand weakness; actual gross margin data (e.g., Q3 2026 earnings) will resolve.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: Memory crisis forces Apple to raise prices (unsustainable shortage); gross margin expansion is accretive but contrarian to bearish sentiment on pricing power

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Ethereum's average daily transaction value (USD) exceed $50 billion by August 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Ethereum.org, Glassnode, or Dune Analytics 30-day rolling average
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: DeFi revisions and MiCA 2.0 engagement expected to unlock institutional flows; sandwich-attack exploit ($7.5M Jaredfromsubway.eth) signals maturing security infra; few markets price EU regulatory tailwind.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph: Crypto industry looks to stablecoins and DeFi revisions in MiCA 2.0; AI security improvements making DeFi cheaper and harder to ignore

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Delta or United report Q3 2026 net margin >6% (higher than industry historical 2-3%)?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Airline SEC filings (10-Q or 10-K), investor relations press release, or Bloomberg consensus
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Spirit bankruptcy signals failure isn't about fuel prices but business model; survivors (Delta, United) now have pricing power and reduced capacity competition. Post-consolidation margin expansion likely.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: Budget airline model in the U.S. is running out of runway; Spirit's bankruptcy as United and Delta fly high suggests structural advantage in full-service carriers

market_questions_to_create.question: Will US SNAP food restrictions expand to >20 additional states by June 30, 2027?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: USDA SNAP policy tracker, state government announcements, or news archive (CNBC, Reuters, AP)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: SNAP restrictions spreading to more states; food giants watching; consumer shift away from soda, candy, processed foods is real. Few prediction markets exist on regulatory spread, but impact on PepsiCo, Kraft, Mondelez is material.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: SNAP food restrictions are spreading to more states, pressuring major food and beverage companies as consumers shift spending away from soda, candy and processed foods

investment_theses.thesis: Long AI chip/memory exposure (NVDA, MU, TSM) on Apple and big-tech capex-driven scarcity pricing through Q3 2026.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Memory crisis forcing Apple to raise prices (unsustainable shortage); CEO Tim Cook highlighted structural constraint
CNBC: Tech giants deploying record capex for AI data centers; cash reserves depleted, debt issuance accelerating
Cointelegraph: AI making crypto security cheaper and faster—enterprise demand for inference chips rising
investment_theses.counter_view: Memory supply recovers faster than expected (new fabs come online early); tech capex cycles cut suddenly if AI ROI questioned or recession fears spike.
investment_theses.expression: Long NVDA and MU via spot or 3-month call spreads; express as (NVDA + 2x MU)/SPY ratio hedge

investment_theses.thesis: Short airline sector outperformance (DAL, UAL underweight vs. SPY) ends by Q3 2026 as post-Spirit consolidation margins compress on labor and fuel headwinds.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Spirit bankruptcy indicates business-model weakness, not fuel-cost issue; survivors (Delta, United) now have pricing power
Airline labor negotiations (UAL, DAL contracts) expected mid-2026; union wage demands post-inflation; historical precedent suggests 15-25% wage inflation in new contracts
investment_theses.counter_view: Consolidation and capacity discipline hold; pricing power persists longer than historical cycles; no recession materializes to drive capacity cuts.
investment_theses.expression: Underweight DAL/UAL via short-term puts or reduce overweight; express as (DAL + UAL)/2 vs. XLF or SPY

investment_theses.thesis: Long geopolitical risk premium on energy (WTI, USO) into June 2026 US-Iran ceasefire talks; Hormuz closure risk is live, even if disputed.
supporting_signals: CNBC & BBC: Vance in Switzerland for US-Iran talks; Iran military claimed Strait of Hormuz closure in response to Israeli strikes in Lebanon
Geopolitical escalation (Israeli strikes in Lebanon ongoing) suggests risk-on for energy; Strait controls ~20% of global oil
Bitcoin holding $64k near geopolitical risk premium; oil and BTC historically correlate in crisis scenarios
investment_theses.counter_view: Ceasefire agreed quickly (within 2 weeks); U.S. military credibility and Iran incentive to avoid total war keep Hormuz open; oil falls back to $70-75.
investment_theses.expression: Long USO or June 2026 WTI calls; hedge via long DXY (dollar strength benefits if crisis averted) or short XLV (defensive sector underperformance in risk-on)

investment_theses.thesis: Bitcoin accumulation phase (DCA into BTC spot or perps) as $6.4B ETF outflows and 4-day decline signal capitulation; macro setup (inflation, rates, AI demand) favors BTC long-term.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: Bitcoin ETFs shed record $6.4B in 30 days; Bitcoin fell 17% over past month—classic washout
CoinDesk: BTC holds near $64k despite Hormuz risk; AI security improvements (cheaper, faster) expanding institutional adoption
CoinDesk: Franklin Templeton proposes ETFs converting corporate dividends into Bitcoin; Schwab entering prediction markets; institutional on-ramp signals long-term bullish structure
investment_theses.counter_view: Sustained recession fears or monetary policy tightening (Fed keeps rates high longer) drives BTC to $50k or lower; on-chain weakness (whale selling, exchange inflows) accelerates.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC via spot, 6-month perps, or IBIT/FBTC; express as BTC/USD ratio or (BTC - 3x SQ)/gold for relative-value hedge

investment_theses.thesis: Regulatory tailwind on DeFi and stablecoins in EU (MiCA 2.0 revisions); Ethereum TVL and DEX volume set up for Q3 2026 recovery as clarity emerges.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: Crypto industry looks to stablecoins and DeFi revisions in MiCA 2.0; EU Commission seeking comment on framework tweaks
CoinDesk: AI making crypto security cheaper and harder to ignore; sandwich-attack exploit ($7.5M) signals maturing infra security
Pudgy Penguins retail expansion (Target trading cards) shows mainstream NFT-to-retail pipeline; institutional appetite for crypto security/DeFi infrastructure remains
investment_theses.counter_view: EU regulatory clarity delays (2027+); framework stiffens rather than loosens; stablecoin deposit rules deter institutional participation.
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH (sector overweight) or Lido/Aave tokens via spot or 4-month calls; express as ETH/BTC ratio or (ETH - 2x SPY)/USD for macro-neutral exposure
